rationale: Review 2's core finding — that an AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints file contains only generic Hopf/bialgebra extensions with no Spec/GrpObj/AffineScheme, so the decls belong in Bialgebra/ and HopfAlgebra/ folders — is the more material placement issue and is confirmed against the diff, and it subsumes Review 1's narrower namespace point, which Review 1 paired with an endorsement of the questionable overall placement.
